title: Flare - Real-Time Wildfire Alert System
description: Flare is a progressive web app that my team and I built to help rural communities easily access real-time wildfire information. The app features an interactive map that displays current wildfire locations, risk level indicators, and the latest wildfire-related news. I developed the chatbot that answers users' wildfire-related questions and ensured the app is installable on both mobile and desktop devices.
myRoleDescription: As a Full-Stack Developer, I designed and implemented key features including:
pwaIntegrationDesc: Enabled the app to be installable from the browser for both android and IOS, supporting offline access and a native-like experience.
chatbotDevelopmentDesc: Built an AI-powered chatbot to help users ask wildfire-related questions and get instant responses using OpenAI API.
realtimeNotificationsDesc: Implemented push notifications to alert users about nearby wildfire threats in real-time.
appWalkthroughDescription: Watch a full walkthrough of the Flare app, showcasing key features and user interactions.
videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
